Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award;
Off Calendar Feb-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER FRANK PITRE, STEVEN SPILLER'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award. Appearances: Ara R. Jabagchourian, Esq. of Cotchett, Pitre & McCarthy (650) 697-6000, and Steven T. Spiller, Esq. of Spiller McProud, (530) 265-5831, both counsel appearing for Petitioner and moving party. There are no other appearances. Counsel are not appearing to argue, they are appearing only to get the Order signed. Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed at the Court's ex parte calendar this date. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Connie J. Parchman, CSR 6137
